mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalBatchCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN batch_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedBatchCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN batch_status = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS abnormalBatchCount, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(biz_date), '%Y-%m-%d') AS latestBizDate, COALESCE(( SELECT batch_status FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '未跑批') AS latestBatchStatus, COALESCE(( SELECT channel_abnormal_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS openChannelAbnormalCount, COALESCE(( SELECT internal_abnormal_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS openInternalAbnormalCount, COALESCE(( SELECT pending_refund_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS openPendingRefundCount, COALESCE(( SELECT channel_success_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS latestChannelSuccessCount, COALESCE(( SELECT CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(channel_success_amount, 2)) FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '¥0.00') AS latestChannelSuccessAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT internal_success_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS latestInternalSuccessCount, COALESCE(( SELECT CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(internal_success_amount, 2)) FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '¥0.00') AS latestInternalSuccessAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT payment_success_gap_count FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS latestPaymentSuccessGapCount, COALESCE(( SELECT CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(payment_success_gap_amount, 2)) FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '¥0.00') AS latestPaymentSuccessGapAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(pending_refund_amount, 2)) FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '¥0.00') AS latestPendingRefundAmount FROM t_payment_day_end_batch

SELECT batch_no AS batchNo, DATE_FORMAT(biz_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS bizDate, run_mode AS runMode, batch_status AS batchStatus, batch_status_type AS batchStatusType, payment_total_count AS paymentTotalCount, payment_success_count AS paymentSuccessCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(payment_success_amount, 2)) AS paymentSuccessAmount, channel_success_count AS channelSuccessCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(channel_success_amount, 2)) AS channelSuccessAmount, internal_success_count AS internalSuccessCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(internal_success_amount, 2)) AS internalSuccessAmount, payment_success_gap_count AS paymentSuccessGapCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(payment_success_gap_amount, 2)) AS paymentSuccessGapAmount, refund_success_count AS refundSuccessCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(refund_success_amount, 2)) AS refundSuccessAmount, channel_abnormal_count AS channelAbnormalCount, internal_abnormal_count AS internalAbnormalCount, pending_refund_count AS pendingRefundCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(pending_refund_amount, 2)) AS pendingRefundAmount, summary_comment AS summaryComment, triggered_by AS triggeredBy, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(completed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS completedAt FROM t_payment_day_end_batch ORDER BY biz_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{bizDate} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM t_payment_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{bizDate} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_refund_order WHERE DATE(success_at) = #{bizDate} AND status = 'SUCCESS'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_notify_log notify_log WHERE notify_log.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND notify_log.notify_type = 'SUCCESS' AND notify_log.notify_status IN ('已收口', 'SUCCESS') )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payment_order.amount), 0) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_notify_log notify_log WHERE notify_log.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND notify_log.notify_type = 'SUCCESS' AND notify_log.notify_status IN ('已收口', 'SUCCESS') )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_event payment_event WHERE payment_event.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND payment_event.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' AND payment_event.publish_status = 'SUCCESS' )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payment_order.amount), 0) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_event payment_event WHERE payment_event.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND payment_event.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' AND payment_event.publish_status = 'SUCCESS' )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_notify_log notify_log WHERE notify_log.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND notify_log.notify_type = 'SUCCESS' AND notify_log.notify_status IN ('已收口', 'SUCCESS') ) OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_event payment_event WHERE payment_event.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND payment_event.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' AND payment_event.publish_status = 'SUCCESS' ) )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payment_order.amount), 0) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_notify_log notify_log WHERE notify_log.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND notify_log.notify_type = 'SUCCESS' AND notify_log.notify_status IN ('已收口', 'SUCCESS') ) OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_event payment_event WHERE payment_event.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND payment_event.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' AND payment_event.publish_status = 'SUCCESS' ) )
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM t_refund_order WHERE DATE(success_at) = #{bizDate} AND status = 'SUCCESS'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_notify_log notify_log WHERE notify_log.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND notify_log.notify_type = 'SUCCESS' AND notify_log.notify_status IN ('已收口', 'SUCCESS') )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order payment_order WHERE DATE(payment_order.created_at) = #{bizDate} AND payment_order.status = 'SUCCESS' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_payment_event payment_event WHERE payment_event.payment_order_id = payment_order.payment_order_id AND payment_event.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' AND payment_event.publish_status = 'SUCCESS' )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_refund_order WHERE DATE(applied_at) = #{bizDate} AND status NOT IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAIL')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM t_refund_order WHERE DATE(applied_at) = #{bizDate} AND status NOT IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAIL')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_day_end_batch ( batch_no, biz_date, run_mode, batch_status, batch_status_type, payment_total_count, payment_success_count, payment_success_amount, channel_success_count, channel_success_amount, internal_success_count, internal_success_amount, payment_success_gap_count, payment_success_gap_amount, refund_success_count, refund_success_amount, channel_abnormal_count, internal_abnormal_count, pending_refund_count, pending_refund_amount, summary_comment, triggered_by, created_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{batchNo}, #{bizDate}, #{runMode}, #{batchStatus}, #{batchStatusType}, #{paymentTotalCount}, #{paymentSuccessCount}, #{paymentSuccessAmount}, #{channelSuccessCount}, #{channelSuccessAmount}, #{internalSuccessCount}, #{internalSuccessAmount}, #{paymentSuccessGapCount}, #{paymentSuccessGapAmount}, #{refundSuccessCount}, #{refundSuccessAmount}, #{channelAbnormalCount}, #{internalAbnormalCount}, #{pendingRefundCount}, #{pendingRefundAmount}, #{summaryComment}, #{triggeredBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
